zh.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen是Steven II van Zuijlen和Henrica van Abcoude的兒子，於大約1205年出生在荷蘭。他和Johanna van Heemstede至少有1個兒子。他去世於大約1260年享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen是Steven II van Zuijlen和Henrica van Abcoude的儿子，于大约1205年出生在荷兰。他和Johanna van Heemstede至少有1个儿子。他去世于大约1260年享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

en.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen was born about 1205, in Netherlands as the son of Steven II van Zuijlen and Henrica van Abcoude. He had at least 1 son with Johanna van Heemstede. He died about 1260, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen est né environ 1205, à Pays-Bas, fils de Steven II van Zuijlen et Henrica van Abcoude. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Johanna van Heemstede. Il est décédé environ 1260, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen wurde um 1205 in Niederlande, als Sohn von Steven II van Zuijlen und Henrica van Abcoude geboren. Er hatte mit Johanna van Heemstede mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1260 im Alter von 57 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen è nato il circa 1205 nel Paesi Bassi come figlio di Steven II van Zuijlen e Henrica van Abcoude. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Johanna van Heemstede. Morì circa 1260, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylenは約1205年にオランダでSteven II van ZuijlenとHenrica van Abcoudeの息子として生まれた。彼はJohanna van Heemstedeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1260年に57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen(은)는 대략 1205년 네덜란드에서 Steven II van Zuijlen(와)과 Henrica van Abcoude의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Johanna van Heemstede(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1260년 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1205–about 1260: tany ho any amin'ny 1205–tany ho any amin'ny 1260

pt.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen nasceu aproximadamente 1205, em Países Baixos filho de Steven II van Zuijlen e Henrica van Abcoude. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Johanna van Heemstede. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1260, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen родился около 1205 г. в местности Нидерланды. Его родителей звали Steven II van Zuijlen и Henrica van Abcoude. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Johanna van Heemstede. Он умер около 1260 г. в возрасте 57 лет.

sm.about 1205–about 1260: e tusa o le 1205–e tusa o le 1260

es.lifeSummary: Gijsbert Van IJsselstein van Zuylen nació aproximadamente 1205, en Países Bajos como hijo de Steven II van Zuijlen y Henrica van Abcoude. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Johanna van Heemstede. Murió aproximadamente 1260, a la edad de 57 años.
